misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, is preparing for what will be his eleventh appearance at the Hector Trophée 2026, marking a significant milestone in his distinguished participation within this unique pair competition. His consistent presence underscores a profound dedication to the event's demanding format and its camaraderie, making him a familiar and respected figure on the course.

Known for his intensely competitive spirit and an expressive on-course temperament, Simo has proven to be an invaluable partner in the team format. His strategic acumen and ability to perform under pressure have been instrumental in leading his pairs to three victorious campaigns, claiming the coveted Hector Trophée on each occasion and solidifying his reputation as a formidable team player.

Despite these considerable team triumphs, the individual Victor Trophy remains an unfulfilled ambition for Simo. In his relentless pursuit of this singular honor, and with an eye towards refining his precision on the greens, he notably adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, a strategic adjustment reflecting his continuous quest for self-improvement and competitive edge.

As Simo once again tees off, his blend of passionate play, proven leadership in pairs, and ongoing technical evolution positions him as a compelling contender. Observers eagerly anticipate his performance, not only in his quest for a fourth team championship but also in his determined pursuit of individual glory.
